calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Determine Prevailing Party And Fix Attorney Fees As Costs In Contract Action;
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST Motion To Determine Prevailing Party and Fix Attorney Fees as Costs In Contract Action. Appearances: Douglas Holloway, Esq. Attorney at Law, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Doug Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Bank of the West.
Plaintiff's Witness Gary Martinez and Bill DeJong were placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant George E. Lodwich.
No appearance by Co-Defendants Maggart & Sons, Inc. dba M & S Express and Safeguard Inc.
Exhibit 1 through 19---------------------------------- ID/EVID.
see scanned doc. for detail of "Plaintiff's Exhibit List" filed in court.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
Principal $135,100.02
Interest $9,678.87
Total Judgment in the amount of $144,778.89
Additional interest from May 27, 2009, costs and attorney's fees per memo of costs or motion.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit 1 through 19 in open court.

Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2009 Set For Trial On Oct-05-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
